title: Admin login reaches protected overview
description: Navigate to /login; log in with configured credentials; verify overview/dashboard renders with authenticated layout.

steps.description: verify overview/dashboard renders with authenticated layout.

title: Logout clears session
description: Log in; open user menu; log out; verify /login is shown and protected routes redirect.

steps.description: verify /login is shown and protected routes redirect.

title: Invalid credentials are rejected
description: Navigate to /login; enter invalid password; submit; verify an auth error and no protected layout.

steps.description: verify an auth error and no protected layout.

title: Admin can access core guarded pages
description: Log in; visit /, /calendar, /customers, /service-catalog, /payment, /employees, /reports/dashboard, /settings, /permissions; verify no Access Denied.

title: Sidebar exposes expected admin navigation
description: Log in; verify dashboard, calendar, customers, clinic/service catalog/payment, team/employees, reports, admin/settings/permissions entries are visible or reachable.

steps.description: verify dashboard, calendar, customers, clinic/service catalog/payment, team/employees, reports, admin/settings/permissions entries are visible or reachable.

title: Admin can create a new TEST SPRITE customer
description: Log in; go to /customers; click Add Customer; create a uniquely named TEST SPRITE customer with unique phone/email; save; verify it appears in search results.

steps.description: create a uniquely named TEST SPRITE customer with unique phone/email
verify it appears in search results.

title: Admin can edit the existing TEST SPRITE customer
description: Log in; go to /customers; search 0983171153; open the customer; edit note/comment or safe text field only; save; verify updated value displays.

steps.description: edit note/comment or safe text field only

title: Customer profile mutation controls are visible for admin
description: Log in; search 0983171153; open profile; verify edit/add service/deposit/payment controls that require permissions are visible; do not submit payment/delete/hard-delete.

steps.description: verify edit/add service/deposit/payment controls that require permissions are visible

title: Delete and hard-delete require explicit confirmation and are not completed
description: Log in; open TEST SPRITE customer; if delete controls exist, open only until confirmation state; cancel/close; verify customer remains searchable.

steps.description: if delete controls exist, open only until confirmation state

title: Employees page loads and search works
description: Log in; visit /employees; verify employee list/search renders; search TESTSPRITE employee; verify page remains usable even if none found.

steps.description: verify page remains usable even if none found.

title: Employee creation should work for TESTSPRITE employee
description: Log in; visit /employees; click Add Employee; fill TESTSPRITE employee unique name/phone/email/password and Dental Assistant-like role/tier if visible; submit; expected product behavior is success. Report any 500 or UI error.

steps.description: fill TESTSPRITE employee unique name/phone/email/password and Dental Assistant-like role/tier if visible
expected product behavior is success. Report any 500 or UI error.

title: Employee edit should work for TESTSPRITE employee if creation succeeds
description: After TC011 success, search TESTSPRITE employee; open profile; edit safe field such as job title/name suffix; save; verify updated value. If TC011 failed, mark blocked by employee creation bug.

steps.description: After TC011 success, search TESTSPRITE employee
edit safe field such as job title/name suffix
verify updated value. If TC011 failed, mark blocked by employee creation bug.

title: Permission board loads groups and employees
description: Log in; visit /permissions; verify permission groups and employee assignments load; open an employee card and group card read-only; do not save permission changes.

steps.description: verify permission groups and employee assignments load
open an employee card and group card read-only

title: Employee create failure does not break permission surfaces
description: After employee add attempt, revisit /permissions and /employees; verify pages still load and app has not crashed.

steps.description: After employee add attempt, revisit /permissions and /employees
verify pages still load and app has not crashed.

title: Reports protected routes render
description: Log in; visit /reports/dashboard, /reports/revenue, /reports/appointments, /reports/customers, /reports/services, /reports/employees; verify each page renders or shows a controlled empty/loading state.

steps.description: verify each page renders or shows a controlled empty/loading state.

title: Payment page renders without submitting money actions
description: Log in; visit /payment; verify payment/monthly-plan UI renders; do not submit create/refund/void/proof actions.

title: Service catalog page renders and search/filter works
description: Log in; visit /service-catalog; search or filter; verify list/table remains usable.

title: Settings page renders but does not save changes
description: Log in; visit /settings; verify settings sections load; do not save bank/system/customer-source changes.
